name: her-warning
prompt: Medium shot. Woman in navy uniform straightening posture, smoothing fabric. Regaining composure. Expression hardening. Cool room lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Valeria
dialogue.text: You'll regret this when she forgets you.

name: walking-to-door
prompt: Medium shot from behind. Woman in navy uniform walking toward door RIGHT of frame. Dark-haired man visible standing LEFT in background. Distance between them growing. Cool room lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: second-door
prompt: Close-up on door closing. Metal surface, handle settling. Cool corridor light at edges disappearing. The same quiet closure. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: door latch clicking closed, quiet and final, echoing the opening
